description: Address v2 review feedback: update stale DOCUMENTATION.md (remove ws-bridge references), normalize GET /status route to return 'running' instead of internal 'active', and cache per-request proxy middleware allocation.
steps: Update DOCUMENTATION.md to remove all references to ws-bridge.js, the bridge property, and ws-bridge usage examples. Update the architecture diagram and service exports to reflect current reality.
Fix GET /api/daytona/sandbox/:sessionId/status to map entry.status 'active' to 'running' in the response, consistent with the POST create route.
Fix GET /api/daytona/sandboxes (list) to also map entry.status 'active' to 'running' in response for consistency.
Add proxy middleware caching in proxy.js keyed by sandbox target URL to avoid per-request allocation.
Update route tests to assert the status mapping from 'active' to 'running'.
acceptance_criteria: DOCUMENTATION.md has no references to ws-bridge.js or bridge property
GET /status returns status 'running' when internal status is 'active'
GET /sandboxes returns status 'running' for active sandboxes
Proxy middleware is cached and reused per target URL
